news.title:
Usha Martin Ltd. breaks short-term descending trendline with higher volume.
The stock shows higher lows, indicating a reversal attempt post-breakout.
news.summary:
Usha Martin Ltd. breaks short-term descending trendline with higher volume.
The stock shows higher lows, indicating a reversal attempt post-breakout.

news.title:
10 penny stocks, including Usha Martin and Supreme Engineering, surged up to 60% in March, defying market slump.
Usha Martin Education saw a 58.8% rise, while Viji Finance and Akme Fintrade gained 37% and 19.3%, respectively.
news.summary:
10 penny stocks, including Usha Martin and Supreme Engineering, surged up to 60% in March, defying market slump.
Usha Martin Education saw a 58.8% rise, while Viji Finance and Akme Fintrade gained 37% and 19.3%, respectively.

news.title:
Usha Martin Ltd announced the availability of its Q3 9M FY26 earnings call audio recording on its website.
The transcript will be shared with stock exchanges and uploaded to the company's website soon.
news.summary:
Usha Martin Ltd announced the availability of its Q3 9M FY26 earnings call audio recording on its website.
The transcript will be shared with stock exchanges and uploaded to the company's website soon.

news.title:
Usha Martin's Q3 profit rose 16.4% YoY to ₹107 crore despite margin pressure; revenue increased 6.6% YoY to ₹917 crore.
EBITDA margin fell to 23.9% from 25.6% due to cost pressures; shares dropped 1.5% to ₹408.95 pre-results.
news.summary:
Usha Martin's Q3 profit rose 16.4% YoY to ₹107 crore despite margin pressure; revenue increased 6.6% YoY to ₹917 crore.
EBITDA margin fell to 23.9% from 25.6% due to cost pressures; shares dropped 1.5% to ₹408.95 pre-results.

news.title:
Usha Martin reports 9M FY25 income at Rs 2754 cr, PBT at Rs 435 cr.
Legal proceedings on land, corruption noted; operations remain unaffected.
news.summary:
Usha Martin reports 9M FY25 income at Rs 2754 cr, PBT at Rs 435 cr.
Legal proceedings on land, corruption noted; operations remain unaffected.

news.title:
Usha Martin Ltd will hold its Q3 & 9M FY26 Earnings Conference Call on Jan 30, 2026, at 10:00 AM IST.
The call will feature senior management discussing results and an interactive Q&A session; details on ushamartin.com.
news.summary:
Usha Martin Ltd will hold its Q3 & 9M FY26 Earnings Conference Call on Jan 30, 2026, at 10:00 AM IST.
The call will feature senior management discussing results and an interactive Q&A session; details on ushamartin.com.

news.title: Usha Martin's subsidiary, Usha Martin Espana S.L., has voluntarily closed in Spain.
news.summary: Usha Martin's subsidiary, Usha Martin Espana S.L., has voluntarily closed in Spain.

news.title:
Usha Martin's Spain subsidiary dissolved with EUR 5,968 loss last year.
Net worth of the subsidiary was negative EUR 2,957; business to continue via other EU units.
news.summary:
Usha Martin's Spain subsidiary dissolved with EUR 5,968 loss last year.
Net worth of the subsidiary was negative EUR 2,957; business to continue via other EU units.

news.title:
Peterhouse Investments sold 200,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd via open market on NSE on 12.12.2025.
Post-sale, their holding is 3,250,000 shares and 185,691 GDRs (1.07% of capital).
news.summary:
Peterhouse Investments sold 200,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd via open market on NSE on 12.12.2025.
Post-sale, their holding is 3,250,000 shares and 185,691 GDRs (1.07% of capital).

news.title:
Rajeev Jhawar acquired 10,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd, raising his voting rights shareholding to 41,45,000 (1.36%).
The acquisition was made via NSE through open market on December 2, 2025, as disclosed under SEBI SAST Regulations.
news.summary:
Rajeev Jhawar acquired 10,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd, raising his voting rights shareholding to 41,45,000 (1.36%).
The acquisition was made via NSE through open market on December 2, 2025, as disclosed under SEBI SAST Regulations.

news.title:
Rajeev Jhawar disclosed acquiring 5,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd under SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
Post-acquisition, Jhawar's holding in Usha Martin stands at 40,90,000 shares, constituting 1.34% voting rights.
news.summary:
Rajeev Jhawar disclosed acquiring 5,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd under SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
Post-acquisition, Jhawar's holding in Usha Martin stands at 40,90,000 shares, constituting 1.34% voting rights.

news.title:
Usha Martin Ltd. released its November 2025 Investor Presentation, showcasing its position as India's leading specialty steel wire rope solutions provider with FY25 consolidated revenue of ₹3,474 crore.
The company emphasizes global reach, robust R&D, and ESG integration, with 74% of revenue from wire ropes and 19.3% ROCE as of FY25, while maintaining strong financial health and operational efficiency.
news.summary:
Usha Martin Ltd. released its November 2025 Investor Presentation, showcasing its position as India's leading specialty steel wire rope solutions provider with FY25 consolidated revenue of ₹3,474 crore.
The company emphasizes global reach, robust R&D, and ESG integration, with 74% of revenue from wire ropes and 19.3% ROCE as of FY25, while maintaining strong financial health and operational efficiency.

news.title:
Peterhouse Investments sold 79,205 Usha Martin shares on NSE, reducing its stake to 1.30%.
The sale involved equity shares and GDRs, maintaining total voting capital at 30.47M post-transaction.
news.summary:
Peterhouse Investments sold 79,205 Usha Martin shares on NSE, reducing its stake to 1.30%.
The sale involved equity shares and GDRs, maintaining total voting capital at 30.47M post-transaction.

news.title:
Stuti Jhawar disclosed acquisition of 6,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd.
Post-acquisition, holding increased to 13,07,000 shares, maintaining 0.43% voting capital.
news.summary:
Stuti Jhawar disclosed acquisition of 6,000 equity shares of Usha Martin Ltd.
Post-acquisition, holding increased to 13,07,000 shares, maintaining 0.43% voting capital.
